source.name: gov.pl — Financial resources required to enter Poland (national visa)

requirements.label: Admission to a Polish institution
requirements.detail: Acceptance/enrolment at a Polish higher-education institution.

requirements.label: Financial resources
requirements.detail: Show at least PLN 776/month (the regulatory minimum) for the year — about PLN 9,312; consulates often expect more.

requirements.label: Health insurance
requirements.detail: Travel/health insurance valid in the Schengen area, then NFZ or private cover.

requirements.label: English/Polish language proof
requirements.detail: IELTS/TOEFL for English-taught, or a Polish certificate for Polish-taught.

requirements.label: Valid passport
requirements.detail: A passport valid for the national (type D) visa period.

requirements.label: Proof of accommodation
requirements.detail: Evidence of accommodation in Poland is usually requested.

requirements.label: Tuition / funds transfer
requirements.detail: Transfer fees or living funds with a low-FX provider.

requirements.label: Connectivity on arrival
requirements.detail: An eSIM gives you a Polish number and data on landing.
